name: Orange-Beef Canapes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the eye of round roast on a rack in a roasting pan.
2. Roast at 325 degrees for 60 minutes, or to desired doneness. Remove from oven and let cool slightly.
3. Wrap the roast tightly in plastic wrap and refrigerate until chilled thoroughly.
4. Cut slices to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
5. Garnish each slice with an orange segment and chopped pistachios.
6. Serve chilled or at room temperature.
